title: AgentRegisterRequest
description: Payload for POST /agents/register — registers a new agent with the ColabBot network.

name.description: Human-readable display name for this agent.

version.description: Semantic version of this agent implementation.

endpoint.description: HTTPS URL the registry will use to push tasks to this agent.

capabilities.description: List of capabilities this agent supports.

items.description: Capability identifier in category/type or reverse-domain format.

model.description: Underlying AI model powering this agent (informational).

max_concurrent_tasks.description: Maximum number of tasks this agent will handle simultaneously.

public_key.description: Base64-encoded DER public key used to verify result signatures.
